content: Hey, I'm so excited for my wedding next year! My fiancée, Emily, and I are planning a big celebration in August 2025.
Congratulations, Frankie! That's amazing news. How's the wedding planning process going so far?
It's been a bit stressful, but we're having fun with it. We just booked a venue in Chicago and now we're looking for a catering service that can provide a good mix of food for our guests.
Chicago is a great city for a wedding. What kind of food are you and Emily thinking of serving at the reception?

We're thinking of having a mix of Italian and Mexican food, since we both love those cuisines. And of course, we'll have a big cake for dessert. I've been baking sourdough bread for years, and I'm thinking of making some sourdough cakes for the wedding.
That sounds delicious! Have you thought about what you'll be doing for your honeymoon?
We're actually planning a trip to Europe, visiting some of the major cities like Paris and Rome. We'll be spending about 10 days traveling and exploring the local culture.
That sounds like an amazing adventure! How did you and Emily meet, and what's your favorite thing to do together?

We met through mutual friends, and we love playing board games and going on hikes together. We're actually planning to go on a hike in the mountains near our home in Denver before the wedding to get some exercise and fresh air.
I work as a Data Scientist at BioGenesis Pharma, and Emily is a doctor at a local hospital. We're both busy with our careers, but we always make time for each other.
That's great to hear. It's wonderful that you and Emily have a strong connection and share similar interests. Do you have any fun activities planned for your wedding celebration?

We're actually planning to have a big party with our friends and family, and we'll be playing some of our favorite board games and having a big dance party. It'll be a fun way to celebrate our love and commitment to each other.
That sounds like a great way to celebrate your wedding. I'm sure you and Emily will have a wonderful time and create some amazing memories.
Thanks, I'm really looking forward to it! I've been working on a leatherworking project in my free time, and I'm planning to give Emily a special leather gift on our wedding day.
That's such a thoughtful gesture. I'm sure Emily will appreciate the gift and the thought you've put into it.

Yeah, I hope so! I've been thinking about what to get her for a while now, and I think this leather gift will be perfect. I've also been planning our honeymoon and I think we'll have a great time exploring Europe together.
I'm sure you will. You and Emily seem like a great couple, and I'm happy to have been a part of your conversation. Congratulations again on your upcoming wedding!
